name: gql.tada
description: Magical GraphQL query engine for TypeScript.

semantic-non-null.note: gql.tada supports its own client-controlled nullability directives (`@_required` and `@_optional`) since 1.1.0, but not semantic non-null.

defer.note: gql.tada is transport agnostic, but types deferred fragment spreads as optional. Related fixes shipped in 1.8.0 and 1.8.3.

stream.note: gql.tada is transport agnostic; `@stream` delivery is handled by the client/server transport.
